creator: possamai@xs4all.nl
text:
I approve.
I do not use the tool anymore, so if anyone feels the need to maintain
it, be my guest. I don't have ISDN anymore so I simply cannot test it
anymore..

Kind regards
M. Possamai

Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of misc/callid,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/113814 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/113814
